headline: Taseko Mines (TSX:TKO) Valuation Check After Florence Startup And Gibraltar Production Gains
summary: Taseko Mines (TSX:TKO) is in focus after an operational update highlighted first quarter production at Florence Copper and Gibraltar, including initial copper output from the new Florence SX/EW plant and higher volumes at Gibraltar. See our latest analysis for Taseko Mines. The operational progress at Florence and Gibraltar has coincided with strong momentum in the share price, with a 37.29% year to date share price return and a very large 1 year total shareholder return of 259.39%,...
